meta.title: Chat | 7ai-web
meta.description: Chat with your assistants and models.

messages.emptySelect: Start a new chat or pick one from the sidebar
messages.emptyThread: Send a message below to start chatting
messages.assistantUnavailableBanner: This assistant is no longer available. You can keep chatting or start a new chat with another assistant.

output.disclaimer: Note: The above was generated by AI for reference only. Use your judgment alongside real-world context.

placeholder.ready: Type a message — Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a new line (Enter selects candidates while composing Chinese/Japanese)
placeholder.noSession: Create or select a conversation first

composer.disclaimer: Reminder: Do not enter secrets, illegal content, or sensitive personal data. AI-generated content is for reference only.

freeTierHint.beforeLink: You are on a free or shared model endpoint; responses may be less stable. In
freeTierHint.afterLink: , connect your own API keys and models for more stable, higher-quality answers.

newChat.title: New chat
newChat.description: Pick an assistant to start, or skip to a general chat.
newChat.loadFailedInline: Could not load assistants. Retry or skip to a general chat.
newChat.emptyHint: Use "Skip · General chat" below, or click "New assistant" above to create one in the console.

deleteConversation.title: Delete conversation
deleteConversation.content: Delete this conversation? All messages will be removed and cannot be recovered.

clearMessages.title: Clear messages
clearMessages.content: This removes all messages in the conversation. The conversation stays in your list. Deleted content cannot be recovered. Continue?

errors.noSession: Create or select a conversation first.
errors.readOnlyBlocked: This test account is read-only. Sending messages is not allowed.

interruption.network_disconnected: Network disconnected before the response finished.
interruption.server_timeout: The server timed out; this response was interrupted.
interruption.unknown: This response ended unexpectedly. You can retry.

card.modelFallback: The model failed. Try again later.
card.retryHintFailed: This attempt failed. You can retry.
card.retryHintInterrupted: This response was interrupted. You can retry.
card.retrySucceeded: This question was answered successfully after a retry.

detail.mcpNoAssistantBody: This conversation has no assistant; MCP tools were not loaded for this turn.
detail.mcpNotMountedBody: The assistant has no MCP configuration mounted, or it is disabled.
